text:
(In reply to Mark Johnston from comment #2)

Your opinion is also correct. I should explain it well and logically, but I am sorry that I cannot.
Instead, I will write an example code to show what the problem is.
I am not sure if the previous problem will still be reproducible.
Please wait as I will try to write an example code that can identify the problem.
